name: Individual Chili Pots- Weight Watchers Favor2
recipeIngredient: 1 serving of low-fat chili sauce (e.g., Hormel Compleats)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, combine the chili beans and diced tomatoes.
2. Add onion, garlic powder, and cumin. Stir until combined.
3. Season with salt to taste.
4. Pour in 1 serving of low-fat chili sauce.
5. Bring mixture to a simmer on medium heat.
6. Reduce heat to low and let it cook for 20-30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro if desired.
